summary: Test Alert Feature (Simulation Mode) testing complete. All 13 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests confirmed: test alert card visible when senior+device selected, Send Test Alert button works, TEST badge visible in Operator Console incidents. Regression tests for guardian and operator logins passed.
critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/my/seniors/{id}/test-alert correctly creates incident with is_test=true
POST /api/my/seniors/{id}/test-alert correctly creates telemetry with is_test metadata
POST /api/my/seniors/{id}/test-alert returns incident_id, type, severity, is_test as expected
POST /api/my/seniors/{id}/test-alert correctly rejects unknown alert types (400)
GET /api/operator/stats excludes test incidents from total_incidents but shows test_incidents count
GET /api/operator/incidents includes is_test field in response
Operator Console shows TEST badge on test incidents in incident list
Frontend test alert card visible when senior+device selected with correct data-testid
Frontend Send Test Alert button works and shows loading state
Telemetry history shows SOS entries with is_test metadata after test alert

test_credentials.test_user_with_senior_device: rajesh.e2e@test.com / secure2026 (senior: Nani Ji, device: WBAND-E2E-001)

seed_data_creation: Multiple test alerts created during testing. Incidents with is_test=true are visible in operator console with TEST badge.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Test alert feature fully functional. Test user rajesh.e2e@test.com has senior 'Nani Ji' with device 'WBAND-E2E-001'. Test alerts create incidents with is_test=true that use reduced escalation thresholds (30s L1, 60s L2, 90s L3). Test incidents auto-resolve after 2 minutes. Operator stats exclude test incidents from totals but show separate test_incidents count. TEST badge visible in operator console incident list.

backend_api_tests: POST /api/my/seniors/{id}/test-alert creates SOS incident with is_test=true (201)
Telemetry created with is_test metadata after test alert
frontend_ui_tests: Seniors page loads with nav-seniors link
Test alert card visible when senior+device selected (test-alert-card)
Send Test Alert button visible and clickable (send-test-alert-btn)
Telemetry history shows SOS entries with is_test metadata
Operator login works (operator-tab, operator-email-input, operator-password-input, operator-login-btn)
Operator console incidents page shows TEST badge on test incidents
Operator dashboard shows stats (open_incidents, escalated_incidents, false_alarm metrics)

verified_features: POST /api/my/seniors/{id}/test-alert creates telemetry with is_test metadata
POST /api/my/seniors/{id}/test-alert returns incident_id, type, severity, is_test
GET /api/operator/stats excludes test incidents but shows test_incidents count
Operator Console: test incidents show TEST badge
Frontend: test alert card visible when senior+device selected
Frontend: telemetry history shows SOS entry after test alert
Operator login and dashboard still works (regression)
